title: Trump says he was 'an hour away' from Iran strike decision before he postponed it
summary_full: Asked how long Iran has to come to the table, Trump said it could be two or three days, or perhaps until Sunday or early next week.
summary_public: Asked how long Iran has to come to the table, Trump said it could be two or three days, or perhaps until Sunday or early next week.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump says he was 'an hour away' from Iran strike decision
